title: T-020 — Allergen profile snapshot at spec activation (03-TECH consumer)
prompt:
# T-020 — Allergen profile snapshot at activation

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §6.3 quality_specifications.allergen_profile, §10.3 03-TECH consumer (allergen_cascade_rm_to_fg)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
During approveSpec (T-019), snapshot the product's allergen profile from 03-TECH §10.2 (`allergen_cascade_rm_to_fg` outputs) into `quality_specifications.allergen_profile` JSONB at the moment of activation. Read-only post-activation.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/server/quality/snapshotAllergenProfile.ts` exports `snapshotAllergenProfile(productId)` returning the JSONB shape {sku, allergen_codes:[], cross_contact_risk:[], cascade_path:[], snapshot_at}.
2. Hook into approveSpec (T-019) as the first step inside the TX so the snapshot is part of activation atomically.
3. Reads from 03-TECH `product_allergens` view; if cascade not resolved (rm-to-fg path missing), reject with PROFILE_UNRESOLVED and abort the TX (V-QA-SPEC-002 strengthened).

## Files
- apps/web/src/server/quality/snapshotAllergenProfile.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/snapshotAllergenProfile.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/approveSpec.ts [modify]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a product with allergens={milk,egg} and a resolved cascade_path, when approveSpec runs and triggers the snapshot, then quality_specifications.allergen_profile contains {sku,allergen_codes:['milk','egg'],cross_contact_risk:[...],cascade_path:[...],snapshot_at:<now>}
2. Given a product whose 03-TECH cascade is unresolved, when approveSpec runs, then the TX aborts with PROFILE_UNRESOLVED and no changes are persisted
3. Given an active spec, when its allergen_profile JSONB is read post-approval, then the value never changes regardless of subsequent 03-TECH product allergen edits (snapshot immutability)

pipeline_inputs.description: Snapshot 03-TECH product allergen profile into quality_specifications.allergen_profile at activation time; abort on unresolved cascade.
pipeline_inputs.details: Helper snapshotAllergenProfile reads 03-TECH product_allergens (cascade_rm_to_fg) and serializes into JSONB shape committed inside approveSpec TX. Unresolved cascade aborts. Snapshot is read-only post-activation (immutability trigger from T-040 covers updates). Tests assert shape, abort path, and post-approval immutability.
out_of_scope: Do not implement cascade rule rm_to_fg (owned by 03-TECH §10.2)
Do not implement spec UI changes (T-022/T-023)
acceptance_criteria: Given a product with allergens={milk,egg} and resolved cascade_path, when approveSpec runs and triggers the snapshot, then quality_specifications.allergen_profile contains {sku,allergen_codes:['milk','egg'],cross_contact_risk:[...],cascade_path:[...],snapshot_at:<now>}
Given a product whose 03-TECH cascade is unresolved, when approveSpec runs, then the TX aborts with PROFILE_UNRESOLVED and no rows change
Given an active spec, when its allergen_profile JSONB is read after subsequent 03-TECH allergen edits, then it remains identical to the value captured at activation (snapshot immutability)
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/snapshotAllergenProfile.test.ts asserting shape, abort, and immutability after upstream edit
risk_red_lines: Do not allow snapshot to drift after activation (immutability per §6.3)
Do not allow approval to proceed when cascade unresolved (regulatory FIC 1169/2011 risk)
Do not bypass 03-TECH view (no shadow allergen joins)
